description: HuggingFace dataset revision SHAs per repo for MMMU benchmarking. The MMMU benchmark loader fails closed when a repo is loaded without a revision entry, forcing the preflight gate (benchmarks/scripts/preflight_mmmu_sweep.py --update-revisions) to populate or refresh this file before any sweep runs. SHAs below were resolved against HuggingFace main branches on 2026-05-15.
